title: Post-compaction: honest report, amnesia notice, task resume
description: After the CompactionManager commits an anchor (unchanged), the post-compaction path reports the compaction and its enrichment under DISTINCT kinds, decides the amnesia notice against the real compaction, and resumes an unfinished turn.

messages.label: render: 1 compaction line + 1 enrichment line (no false double)
reverse-scan; skip kind!=='compaction' (enrichment skipped); reach real compaction — DD-2
inject:true for the real narrative anchor
unfinished turn? resume via replay/minimal Continue — DD-3

title: Provider gate declines unnecessary claude compaction
description: A cache-aware / legacy-large-policy trigger is routed through the per-provider strategy; claude with window headroom declines, codex/general proceed unchanged (DD-4).
